creator: amdmi3@mail.ru
text:
* FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org (FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org) wrote:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=102827
Sorry, I've forgot to update plist. Here's corrected patch:

--- blobandconquer-0.4-1.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN blobandconquer.orig/Makefile blobandconquer/Makefile
--- blobandconquer.orig/Makefile	Sun Sep  3 22:03:29 2006
+++ blobandconquer/Makefile	Sun Sep  3 22:03:36 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	blobandconquer
-DISTVERSION=	0.3-1
+DISTVERSION=	0.4-1
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.parallelrealities.co.uk/download.php?type=zip&file=
 DISTNAME=	blobAndConquer-${DISTVERSION}
diff -ruN blobandconquer.orig/distinfo blobandconquer/distinfo
--- blobandconquer.orig/distinfo	Sun Sep  3 22:03:29 2006
+++ blobandconquer/distinfo	Sun Sep  3 22:18:43 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (blobAndConquer-0.3-1.tar.gz) = fe2c82571ffcbd9e60257e8dfdc2af70
-SHA256 (blobAndConquer-0.3-1.tar.gz) = 4609270efed89771e6dfb548c30bc976217c85dd9626f8d7b772274789ebe7c1
-SIZE (blobAndConquer-0.3-1.tar.gz) = 23165363
+MD5 (blobAndConquer-0.4-1.tar.gz) = bd4b1c83a5059897490a138aecd91589
+SHA256 (blobAndConquer-0.4-1.tar.gz) = be236fc7883d20f79986042d41d17a2cd936460d17ae8574fd93adf6db16bbab
+SIZE (blobAndConquer-0.4-1.tar.gz) = 23959562
diff -ruN blobandconquer.orig/pkg-plist blobandconquer/pkg-plist
--- blobandconquer.orig/pkg-plist	Sun Sep  3 22:03:29 2006
+++ blobandconquer/pkg-plist	Mon Sep  4 00:13:45 2006
@@ -72,6 +72,7 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/data/gameDefs/features
 %%DATADIR%%/data/gameDefs/items
 %%DATADIR%%/data/gameDefs/weapons
+%%DATADIR%%/data/locale/additional
 %%DATADIR%%/data/locale/battle
 %%DATADIR%%/data/locale/cheats
 %%DATADIR%%/data/locale/controls
@@ -85,7 +86,6 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/data/locale/system
 %%DATADIR%%/data/locale/weapons
 %%DATADIR%%/data/misc/letterFrequencyTable
-%%DATADIR%%/data/missions/enemytest

 %%DATADIR%%/data/missions/mission01
@@ -136,13 +136,13 @@

 %%DATADIR%%/data/widgets/gameover
@@ -162,6 +162,7 @@

 %%DATADIR%%/gfx/game/orderIcon1.png
@@ -197,17 +198,20 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/gfx/rw2/pointer.blend.raw
 %%DATADIR%%/gfx/rw2/rifle.blend.raw
 %%DATADIR%%/gfx/rw2/uzi.blend.raw

-%%DATADIR%%/music/Vort Boojaart.mod
-%%DATADIR%%/music/War Tales 3.xm
+%%DATADIR%%/music/The Siege.xm
 %%DATADIR%%/music/Warlord Theme.s3m
 %%DATADIR%%/music/Zenith.s3m
 %%DATADIR%%/sound/ambience/general/rain.ogg
@@ -222,6 +226,7 @@

@@ -331,6 +349,7 @@
